The physician or allowed practitioner's order should indicate the frequency of the home 
health aide services required by the patient. These services may include but are not 
limited to: 

A. Personal Care 

Personal care means: 
 1. Bathing, dressing, grooming, caring for hair, nail, and oral hygiene which are 
needed to facilitate treatment or to prevent deterioration of the patient's health,
